'''Breath of Heaven''' was an expensive and exceedingly strong [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage. One of its ingredients was [[Rice/Legends|rice]].

==Behind the scenes==
Breath of Heaven appeared in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
